crime.value: Murder of prostitute Melissa Blundell, killed by stranger after being hired for services
crime.quote: the letter was written in the victim's blood. I also found a DNA match already in the system.

victim.value: Melissa Blundell, a prostitute who was targeted while working a new corner seeking wealthier clients
victim.quote: She was told by Erica Hasley that rich guys tend to pick up there and she was hoping for a chance to make more money

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown perpetrator connected to a three-year-old rape case, possibly seeking revenge related to a NYU criminology student
culprit_and_motive.quote: DNA matched a rape case from quite a few years back. The perp was never caught but we have his sperm in the system

investigator.value: Detective Rowe and team (Verday, Gabrielsson, Fisher) investigating the murder, with Rowe having personal connection to NYU
investigator.quote: Rowe had a tiny flashback of his time as a professor in criminology at NYU

red_herring.value: DNA match suggests family connection to old rape case, potentially misdirecting toward revenge motive
red_herring.quote: Maybe it's an angry relative looking to avenge their sibling

clue_fairness.value: DNA evidence and college connection revealed to reader simultaneously with investigators
clue_fairness.quote: the DNA matched a rape case from quite a few years back

social_world.value: Police department hierarchy with senior/junior dynamics, academic-criminal justice institutional overlap
social_world.quote: Don't worry, I will never disregard your seniority

reveal_mechanic.value: DNA matching system connecting current victim to historical rape case through family genetics
reveal_mechanic.quote: the DNA matched a rape case from quite a few years back

investigator_wound.value: Rowe's guilt over past relationship with student, connection to NYU criminology department
investigator_wound.quote: He was very upset for his decistion to leave her and ashamed of how he did it
